posts.caption:
All pharmacists know that feeling.

You’re in the consultation… but you’re not really in it.

Rahul put it plainly.

“If I’m being totally honest with you… you’re either typing something, not looking at the patient, or you’re scribbling things down.”

“Note-taking was, in fairness, pretty poor.”

He was already running clinics across two branches. Already using systems. Already building structure around them.

What he didn’t realise was how much friction sat between them.

When Titan, Titanverse and demdx came together properly, everything moved under one roof.

Pre-consult questionnaires built in.
Appointment confirmations sent automatically.
Follow-ups handled inside the same system.

And then the shift that changed the room:

AI transcription.

“It’s just saved probably about 10 to 20 minutes per patient.”

Not rough notes.
Not something to tidy up later.
High-quality documentation done in the background.

“Now we can maintain good eye contact with the patient, build a really good rapport.”

The result?

Double the consultations.
Higher standard of care.
Safer environment for the patient.

“People still regard pharmacies as chemists where we’re now clinical diagnostic hubs.”

That leap doesn’t happen because you work harder.

It happens when your systems finally work together.

#Titanverse #CommunityPharmacy #ClinicalServices #PharmacyBusiness

posts.caption:
"I can't believe AI transcription wasn't a thing in pharmacy."

Scraps of paper. Missed notes. Zero eye contact.

Now Titanverse records the whole consultation. Compliant. Searchable. Done.

10-20 minutes saved. Every patient.

#Titanverse #PharmacyTok #AIinPharmacy #CommunityPharmacy #PharmacyLife
posts.alt_text:
# Rahul - "I can't believe AI transcription wasn't a thing in pharmacy." – Alt Text

## Design Brief (from Notion)

Vertical/9:16 edit of Rahul's AI transcription clip for TikTok, YouTube Shorts, Facebook, Instagram. Punchy, fast-paced style.

NOTE: Platforms field only has TikTok@titanpmr available. This should go on Titanverse social accounts (TikTok, YT, FB, Insta).

Hook (first 2 seconds): Text overlay 'Pharmacy note-taking was TERRIBLE' or 'Scraps of paper?!' with Rahul's voice starting immediately.

Quick cuts between the problem (scribbling, not looking at patient) and the solution (Titanverse transcribing).

Bold text overlays throughout:
- 'Scraps of paper'
- '10-20 mins saved per patient'
- 'Everything compliant'

End card: Titanverse logo + 'Link in bio'

Keep under 45 seconds. Front-load the hook. Titanverse pink-magenta to purple gradient on text elements.

posts.caption:
Switch it on. Walk away.

Titan AI runs a full 40 point clinical and dosage check on every prescription.

The same way.
Every script.
Every time.

It filters risk.
It clears the routine work.
It raises what needs a pharmacist.

In this workflow, 72% of checks are auto-cleared.
Bench time drops.
Time for services increases.

This is not a shortcut.
It is safety at scale.
It is the #titanway.

Full clinical artificial intelligence.
Working quietly while you focus on the work only you can do.
